title: Easy Diary
description: Adds a /diary command that lets players create, access, and store their own custom diaries in-game.
body:
📖 About the Mod

The Diary Command Mod introduces a fully customizable diary system into Minecraft, giving players the ability to record their journey, discoveries, and personal notes directly in-game. Instead of relying on external notes or remembering everything, this mod provides an immersive way to keep track of your adventures with simple commands.

With the /diary command, players gain access to a book & quill interface that serves as their personal diary. Unlike the vanilla book & quill, this diary comes with unlimited storage, allowing you to write and save as much information as you need without ever running out of space.

✨ Features

✍️ Write Notes – Use /diary notes to write down reminders, ideas, or anything else you want to remember.

📍 Save Coordinates – Store important locations like bases, villages, strongholds, or hidden treasures with /diary coords.

⏰ Track Time – Record the current in-game time using /diary time to keep logs or mark special moments.

📂 File Management – Create your own diary files with /diary create <file name>, open them with /diary open <file name>, rename, delete, or list them whenever needed.

📖 Organized Storage – Keep multiple diaries for different purposes, such as exploration logs, building projects, or resource tracking.

🔒 Client-Side Only – All diary files and commands are stored locally, ensuring your notes are personal and not shared with a server.

🗂️ Utility Commands – /diary help lists all commands, and /diary clear lets you wipe everything if you want a fresh start.

🧭 Why Use This Mod?

This mod is perfect for players who love organization, roleplay, or storytelling. You can use it as a travel journal, a project planner, or even a roleplay diary that grows with your character. Whether you’re documenting your first diamond find, logging coordinates of your secret base, or keeping a daily survival journal, the Diary Command Mod makes it seamless and fun.
